Why Choose smartLET

Best in Class
Digital Experience

Superior image quality and step-by-step rental flow offer a seamless, user-friendly experience - from discovery to deal.

Verified
Properties

Every listing is verified for accuracy and authenticity, ensuring tenants see only real, trustworthy properties.

Tenant
Screening

Secured rentals by verifying tenant documents, protecting homeowners from risks and providing a smoother approval process.

Property
Inspection

A fair, photo-documented inspection to protect both tenants and homeowners from future disputes.

End to End
Solution

The entire rental process - from listing to move-in is ensured with a seamless, hassle-free experience for both tenants and homeowners.

Learn More

Introducing smartVIEW

smartVIEW is our proprietary property showcase feature that provides an immersive and high-definition viewing experience of rental properties.
